name: Savoy - IHCL SeleQtions
description: A heritage hotel offering colonial-style architecture, lush gardens, and a timeless atmosphere reflecting the charm of Ooty.

name: Sterling Ooty Fern Hill
description: Nestled on a hillside with panoramic views of the valley, this resort provides a perfect blend of modern comfort and natural serenity.

name: WelcomHeritage Ayatana, Ooty
description: An upscale property known for its exquisite design, peaceful surroundings, and premium hospitality services in the heart of the Nilgiris.

name: Fortune Resort Sullivan Court
description: A classic resort featuring well-appointed rooms and excellent amenities, located conveniently close to major tourist attractions.

name: Sherlock Hotel
description: A charming, Victorian-style boutique hotel offering cozy accommodations and a quiet, nostalgic experience overlooking the Ooty valley.
